changes_summary: REQ-002: Added edge case handling for context gathering failures (yield blocked with diagnostics)
REQ-002: Added edge case handling for contradictory context (yield need-decision for user resolution)
REQ-003: Defined gap sizes with specific percentages (≥80% small, 50-79% medium, <50% large)
REQ-003: Made question ranges explicit (1-2 for small, 3-5 for medium, 6+ for large gaps)
REQ-003: Added edge case for sparse issue and context (<20% coverage triggers full interview)
REQ-003: Enhanced depth decision traceability (includes gap percentage and question count)
REQ-004: Added error handling requirement to pattern
REQ-004: Added contradictory context resolution requirement to pattern
All requirements: Added explicit 'Depends on' field showing requirement dependencies

qa_issues_addressed.issue: REQ-003 AC: 'Small gaps' and 'large gaps' are undefined
qa_issues_addressed.resolution: Added specific percentage thresholds: ≥80% = small, 50-79% = medium, <50% = large

qa_issues_addressed.issue: REQ-003 AC: Question ranges '1-2' vs '3-5+' are vague
qa_issues_addressed.resolution: Made ranges explicit with clear bounds: 1-2 (small), 3-5 (medium), 6+ (large)

qa_issues_addressed.issue: REQ-002: Missing edge case - context gathering failures
qa_issues_addressed.resolution: Added AC: yield blocked with diagnostic information on failures

qa_issues_addressed.issue: Missing edge case - contradictory information in context
qa_issues_addressed.resolution: Added AC to REQ-002: yield need-decision with conflicting statements

qa_issues_addressed.issue: REQ-003: Missing edge case - sparse issue AND context
qa_issues_addressed.resolution: Added AC: <20% coverage triggers full interview by default
Added 'Depends on' field to each requirement showing dependency chain

decisions.choice: Apply to ALL interview skills (pm, architect, design)
decisions.reason: User explicitly stated: 'Apply this pattern to ALL interview skills'

decisions.choice: REQ-002 as P0, REQ-003 and REQ-004 as P1
decisions.reason: Context gathering prevents wasted user time (P0), adaptive depth and consistency are important but secondary (P1)
